\begin{circuitikz}
    
    % Place logic gates
    \draw (0,0)             node[nand port, number inputs=2](nand1){}
    ([yshift=-2cm] nand1)    node[nand port, number inputs=2](nand2){}
    
    % Internal connections
    (nand1.in 2)            to[short] ++(0,-0.5)
                            to[short] ([yshift=0.5cm] nand2.out)
                            to[short] (nand2.out)
    (nand2.in 1)            to[short] ++(0,0.5)
                            to[short] ([yshift=-0.5cm] nand1.out)
                            to[short] (nand1.out)
    
    % Latch inputs
    (nand1.in 1)            to[short] ++(-0.5,0) coordinate(R)
                            node[left](){$\overline{S}$}
    (nand2.in 2)            to[short] (\tikztostart -| R)
                            node[left](){$\overline{R}$}
    
    % Latch outputs
    (nand1.out)             to[short, *-] ++(0.5,0) coordinate(Q)
                            node[right](){$Q$}
    (nand2.out)             to[short, *-] (\tikztostart -| Q)
                            node[right](){$\overline{Q}$}
    ;

\end{circuitikz}
